home.heroSubtitle: Standards change. Regulations shift. Late-stage decisions get expensive. Bespoke research and implementation that turns engineering complexity into defensible decisions — for industrial enterprises that can't afford the wrong answer.
home.ctaSubtitle: Whether you need bespoke research, engineering implementation services, or strategic advisory, we deliver outcomes that matter.
home.serviceOverviewDesc: Spanning the full research and engineering intelligence lifecycle
home.researchCardDesc: Bespoke intelligence across energy, standards, AI, technology scouting, market intelligence, and patent analytics.
home.implCardDesc: Implementation, integration, and consulting services that help engineering organizations extract maximum value from their tools.
home.methodStep1Desc: We define exactly what you need to decide — not a generic brief.
home.methodStep2Desc: Proprietary databases, public datasets, expert networks, and primary interviews.
home.methodStep3Desc: Findings reviewed by someone who has operated in your industry.
home.industriesDesc: Published author, conference speaker, and recognized expert across four major industry verticals
home.faq1Q: How is intelle.io different from Tier-1 consultancies?
home.faq1A: Tier-1 firms staff engagements with junior analysts using templates. We deliver senior-practitioner work end-to-end. Comparable output quality, 30–50% lower cost, and a quarter of the turnaround. The founder has 25+ years across S&P Global, IHS Markit, GE Energy, Accuris (a KKR portfolio company), and Sapient Consulting.
home.faq2Q: Do you serve mid-tier EPCs and scale-ups, or only Fortune 500 NOCs?
home.faq2A: Both. We deliberately serve mid-tier EPCs and industrial scale-ups who need decision-grade intelligence but can't afford Tier-1 fees. NOC innovation arms get the same senior-led work — engagement shape adapts to scope.
home.faq3Q: Where are you based and which markets do you cover?
home.faq3A: Headquartered in Dubai (SparkLab LLC). Primary coverage: GCC (Saudi, UAE, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Bahrain) and India. Secondary coverage: global English-language markets where industrial AI, energy transition, or standards work has cross-border relevance.
home.faq4Q: What types of engagements do you take on?
home.faq4A: Two service tracks: Research & Innovation (energy research, standards, industrial AI, technology scouting, market intelligence, patent IP, strategic engagements) and Implementation (Accuris adoption, PLM/ALM, knowledge management, standards advisory). Engagements typically run 2–14 weeks. Lead-gen call is free.
home.faq5Q: Do you have reference engagements we can review?
home.faq5A: Fortune 500 reference engagements with Aramco, ADNOC, Shell, Chevron, Honeywell, Baker Hughes, and GE Energy — available under NDA on request. Public-record credentials include SAE-published research on industrial AI and CERAWeek invited-speaker status.

about.heroPara1: {name} is a brand of {entity}, headquartered in {location}. We combine deep domain expertise with rigorous research to deliver bespoke intelligence that helps organizations navigate complexity and act with confidence.
about.heroPara2: Our team draws on over a decade of direct engagement with the world's largest engineering organizations, national oil companies, and technology providers — understanding the engineering realities behind the numbers, not just the market data.
about.storyPara1: intelle.io was founded by Arnab Ghosh — a practitioner who has spent 25+ years at the intersection of industry, technology, and AI.
about.storyPara2: From Sapient Consulting and GE Energy to Dell-EMC, IHS Markit, S&P Global, and lately Accuris, Arnab has worked across the full arc of enterprise technology — helping organizations in Energy, Aerospace & Defense, and Digital Manufacturing turn complex data into decisions. He has advised Fortune 500 companies including Saudi Aramco, ADNOC, QP, KPC, Boeing, NASA, Shell, and Chevron to name a few, earning his customers' trust for measurable impact.
about.storyPara3: That experience revealed a consistent gap: <emph>enterprises don't just need software or data platforms — they need intelligence.</emph> Someone who understands their context, can research their specific needs, and deliver recommendations they can act on. The global consultancies charge a premium for generic work. The niche analysts lack practitioner depth. And the platform vendors stop at the login screen.
about.storyPara4: intelle.io fills that gap — <emph>practitioner-led, bespoke intelligence</emph> for organizations that need real answers, not polished slide decks.
about.stat25Years: Years at the intersection of industry, technology & AI
about.statFortune500: Clients advised — Aramco, ADNOC, Boeing, NASA, Shell & more
about.stat3Domains: Core domains: Energy, Aerospace & Defense, Digital Manufacturing
about.value1Desc: 11+ years of deep engagement across energy, engineering, and technology sectors. We understand the engineering realities behind the numbers, not just the market data.
about.value2Desc: Every engagement is tailored. No off-the-shelf reports, no generic recommendations. We deliver intelligence designed for your specific decision.
about.value3Desc: We measure success by the decisions our research enables and the outcomes those decisions produce — not the pages we deliver.
about.value4Desc: Our team has built products, sold to enterprises, and operated in the industries we research. We bring practitioner depth, not analyst distance.
about.method1Desc: We start by understanding what you actually need to decide. Not a generic research brief, but a structured scoping of the specific intelligence that will drive your decision.
about.method2Desc: We draw on proprietary databases, public datasets (IEA, IRENA, ISO catalogs, USPTO), expert networks, and primary interviews. Every data point is sourced and verified.
about.method3Desc: Findings are reviewed through the lens of someone who has operated in the industry — not just researched it. This is where generic consulting fails and practitioner-led intelligence excels.
about.method4Desc: We deliver decision-ready intelligence documents, not shelfware. Every deliverable is designed to answer a specific question and enable a specific action.
about.method5Desc: Our relationship doesn't end with the deliverable. We remain available for follow-up questions, updated analysis, and strategic guidance as your situation evolves.
about.engage1Desc: Free, no-obligation 30-minute call to understand your challenge and identify how we can help.
about.engage2Desc: We develop a detailed scope of work, timeline, and fee estimate tailored to your specific needs.
about.engage3Desc: We execute the engagement with iterative check-ins, delivering intelligence on time and on scope.
about.engage4Desc: Post-delivery briefing and ongoing availability for questions, updates, and strategic guidance.
about.leadershipPara: Our founding team brings 25+ years of experience across Sapient, GE Energy, Dell-EMC, IHS Markit, S&P Global, and Accuris — combining deep industry knowledge with enterprise technology and AI expertise to serve clients across energy, aerospace, and manufacturing.
about.highlight1: Published in SAE International on Cognitive AI in engineering
about.highlight2: CERAWeek speaker and ministerial panel moderator
about.highlight4: Recognized for measurable enterprise customer impact across multiple organizations
about.highlight6: AI & ML (UT Austin) | MBA (IIM Kozhikode) | CS (Jadavpur University)
about.networkPara: intelle.io combines senior-level advisory with a network of delivery partners, domain experts, and research capabilities that allow us to scale engagements without sacrificing quality.
about.network1Desc: Engineers available through our offshore delivery partnership for PLM/ALM integration, API development, and large-scale implementation projects.
about.network2Desc: Industry verticals covered through our network of subject matter experts spanning energy, aerospace, medical devices, and manufacturing.
about.network3Desc: Access to proprietary databases, SDO publications, patent offices (USPTO, EPO, WIPO), and institutional research partnerships.
about.network4Desc: Deep familiarity with ISO, IEC, API, ASME, ASTM, MIL-STD, FDA, EU MDR, NACE, and national standards organizations across GCC and beyond.
about.ctaPara: Whether you need bespoke research, engineering consulting, or strategic intelligence — every engagement starts with a free diagnostic call.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: {entity} ("{name}", "we", "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information.
privacyPage.collectBody: We collect information you voluntarily provide through our contact form, including your name, email address, company name, phone number, and message content.
privacyPage.use1: To respond to your inquiries and service requests
privacyPage.use3: To improve our website and services
privacyPage.retentionBody: We retain your personal information only as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by law.
privacyPage.securityBody: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction.
privacyPage.rightsBody: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. To exercise these rights, please contact us at {email}.
privacyPage.thirdPartyBody: We may use third-party services (such as analytics and email providers) that collect and process data on our behalf. These services are bound by their own privacy policies.
privacyPage.changesBody: We may update this policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
privacyPage.contactBody: For questions about this privacy policy, contact us at {email} or {phone}.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the {name} website operated by {entity}.
termsPage.useBody: Our website provides information about our research and engineering intelligence services. By accessing this website, you agree to these terms.
termsPage.ipBody: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of {entity} and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
termsPage.liabilityBody: The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only. {entity} makes no warranties about the accuracy or completeness of this information.
termsPage.confidentialityBody: Any information shared through our contact form or during consultations may be treated as confidential. Specific confidentiality terms will be outlined in individual engagement agreements.
termsPage.governingBody: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United Arab Emirates.
termsPage.contactBody: For questions about these terms, contact us at {email}.

cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.intro: This policy explains how {name} ({entity}) uses cookies and similar technologies.
cookiesPage.whatBody: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help provide a better user experience.
cookiesPage.essentialBody: Required for the website to function properly. These cannot be disabled.
cookiesPage.analyticsBody: We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with our website. These cookies collect anonymous usage data.
cookiesPage.authBody: Used to maintain admin sessions for content management purposes.
cookiesPage.managingBody: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect website functionality.
cookiesPage.contactBody: For questions about our cookie policy, contact us at {email}.
